initially: A conductor raising the baton in total silence before the first note, dark concert hall, golden stage light
absolutely: A total solar eclipse with a perfect golden corona ring in a dark sky
almost: A water droplet hanging at the very tip of a dark leaf, a heartbeat from falling, golden backlight
apparently: An iceberg with a small golden-lit tip above dark water and an immense mass hidden below the surface
briefly: A single match flaring for one brilliant golden moment in complete darkness
carefully: A person carrying a tall stack of porcelain teacups across a dark room, mid-step, utter concentration, golden lamplight
certainly: The sun's golden rim breaking the dark sea horizon at dawn, unstoppable and certain
clearly: Freshly cleaned eyeglasses held up toward a dark city, the world sharp and golden through the lenses
closely: Two owls perched shoulder to shoulder on a dark branch under a golden moon
completely: A fully bloomed golden lotus resting open on dark still water
considerably: A river swollen far beyond its dark banks after rain, golden dawn light on the wide water
constantly: A waterfall pouring without pause into a dark pool, golden mist rising
currently: A stage actor mid-line in the golden spotlight at this exact moment, dark theater around him
directly: A hawk diving straight down toward dark water in one golden streak
effectively: A single well-placed golden wedge splitting a huge dark log cleanly in two
entirely: A full golden harvest moon wholly risen over dark harvested fields
equally: Two children on identical swings swinging in perfect sync at golden dusk, dark park
especially: A spotlight picking out one golden-costumed dancer among a dark ensemble frozen in shadow
essentially: A seed cut open in macro revealing its glowing golden core, dark background
exactly: A tailor's chalk line meeting the dark fabric edge to the millimeter, golden thread nearby
